data.title: Fratarcangeli Wealth Management CEO Ranked No. 1 in the Michigan - Detroit area on Forbes' Best-In-State Wealth Advisors
data.description: Today, Fratarcangeli Wealth Management revealed that its founder and CEO, Jeffrey Fratarcangeli, has been recognized as one of the top 250 wealth advisors in the United States. The firm, based in Bloomfield Hills, Michigan, caters to high-net-worth individuals. This announcement was made on April 16, 2026.

data.title: Curaleaf Launches Share Repurchase Program
data.description: On April 16, 2026, Curaleaf Holdings, Inc., a prominent global supplier of consumer cannabis goods, revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a decision on the Toronto Stock Exchange involving its stock symbols TSX: CURA and OTCQX: CURLF.

data.title: FBS Global Limited Receives Nasdaq Deficiency Notice Regarding Minimum Bid Price Requirement
data.description: The company's common shares will keep trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market, and its listing on the exchange remains unaffected by the Notice received.

data.title: Bilibili Inc. to Hold Annual General Meeting on June 17, 2026
data.description: Recently, Bilibili Inc. (NASDAQ: BILI and HKEX: 9626) announced the release of the AGM Circular containing details regarding proposals to be presented at the upcoming annual general meeting on June 17, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. (Hong Kong time) in Shanghai. The AGM aims to secure shareholder approval on outlined resolutions. Interested parties may access the AGM Circular, AGM Notice, and proxy form on the Company’s investor relations site: http://ir.bilibili.com. The event will take place at Building 3, Guozheng Center, No. 485 Zhengli Road, Yangpu District, Shanghai, China.

data.title: Gildan Activewear Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Gildan Activewear Inc. (GIL; TSX and NYSE) is set to reveal its financial and operating performance for the first quarter of 2026 on Thursday, April 30, 2026. The company will release a press statement before the markets open on the same day, followed by a conference call at 8:30 AM ET to analyze the results.

data.title: FNB Likely To Report Higher Q1 Earnings; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: F.N.B. Corporation is set to release its first-quarter earnings after the market closes on Thursday, April 16. Analysts are anticipating earnings of 38 cents per share, a rise from the previous year's 32 cents per share. The projected revenue for the quarter is $454.02 million, an increase from the $411.61 million reported last year. The company recently announced a hike in its quarterly dividend from 12 cents to 13 cents per share, along with a $250 million stock repurchase plan. FNB's stock closed at $17.89 on Wednesday, marking a 0.9% increase. For more details and analyst ratings, interested individuals can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga's platform.

data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Truist Financial Stock Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
data.description: Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings on April 17. Analysts predict earnings of $1.00 per share, an increase from 89 cents per share in the previous year. The consensus for quarterly revenue is $5.18 billion, up from $4.95 billion last year. JP Morgan analyst Vivek Juneja, on April 7, maintained Truist Financial with a Neutral rating and reduced the price target to $51.5 from $57. With an annual dividend yield of 4.19%, Truist Financial offers a quarterly dividend of 52 cents per share ($2.08 annually). Investors are watching for potential gains from dividends as well. For more details, refer to the complete story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dodgers' Dave Roberts Wins Big With Focus On The Top Prize
data.description: The manager of the Los Angeles Dodgers, Dave Roberts, is an inspirational figure due to his dedication and humility. Despite his success, Roberts remains focused on achieving the ultimate goal. This commitment has led to significant victories for the Dodgers, making him a role model for many.

data.title: Chip Foundry TSMC Beats First-Quarter Targets, Guides Up
data.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company exceeded expectations for the first quarter and provided a higher forecast than anticipated for the second quarter. Despite this positive news, TSM's stock experienced a decline following the announcement. The chip foundry giant's strong performance resulted in beating Q1 targets and raising guidance moving forward.
Nykredit Realkredit A/S adjusts coupon rates for their loans.
ISS A/S's Annual General Meeting outcomes released, including crucial statistics.
Nykredit Realkredit A/S is correcting coupon rates.

data.title: Valvoline Inc. Named One of America’s Most Trustworthy Companies by Newsweek
data.description: Valvoline Inc., a leading provider of preventive automotive maintenance, has been recognized as one of America’s Most Trustworthy Companies for 2026 by Newsweek. This prestigious accolade is given to companies showcasing high levels of trust among customers, employees, and investors. Valvoline Inc. is particularly lauded in the automotive and components sector, being the highest-rated quick-lube service provider. The annual assessment ranks companies based on trust levels across various industries.

data.title: Capstone Reports FY2025 Results and Guides to 54% Revenue Growth and 4x EBITDA Growth in 2026
data.description: Capstone Holding Corp., a tech-enabled building products distribution platform listed on NASDAQ as CAPS, revealed its financial outcomes for the final quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2025. The company achieved approximately $46.9 million in revenue at the end of FY2025, noting a growth in gross margin to 23.0%. This enhancement was attributed to expanded scale through acquisitions and a more lucrative product assortment. Looking ahead to FY2026, Capstone anticipates a notable revenue surge of 54% to reach $72.1 million. Furthermore, the gross margin is projected to climb to 26%, while EBITDA is expected to...

data.title: QuickLogic Appoints Quantum Leap Solutions as Authorized Sales Representative
data.description: QuickLogic Corporation, a company specializing in embedded FPGA (eFPGA) Hard IP, Strategic Radiation Hardened, Antifuse, and ruggedized FPGAs, revealed a new partnership that extends customer engagement opportunities for their ASIC, IP, and chiplet solutions. The announcement was made in San Jose, California on April 16, 2026, as per PRNewswire. QuickLogic Corporation, listed as NASDAQ: QUIK, aims to leverage this partnership to enhance its market presence and offer a comprehensive range of solutions to its consumers. This move signifies a strategic growth initiative by the company to capture a larger market share and meet the increasing demand for advanced semiconductor solutions.
NVIDIA Supplier Taiwan Semiconductor Is Winning The AI Chip War — And The CEO Just Told Intel, Tesla Why

data.title: Realbotix to Expand Operations in New Facility
data.description: Realbotix Corp., a prominent AI and humanoid robot manufacturer, is moving its robotics operations to a larger facility in the Las Vegas corridor for expansion purposes. The company (TSX-V: XBOT) (Frankfurt: 76M0.F) (OTC: XBOTF) has secured a new leased facility and plans to finish the relocation by June 2026. This move signifies a significant step for Realbotix as it leaves its previous location to accommodate its growth and scaling initiatives.

data.title: Fulgent to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on Friday, May 1, 2026
data.description: Fulgent Genetics, Inc., a technology-driven company with laboratory and therapeutic development divisions, is scheduled to report its first quarter 2026 financial results on May 1, 2026, before the market opens. The company, listed as FLGT on NASDAQ, will hold a conference call for investors at 8:30 AM ET (5:30 AM PT) on the same day to provide insights into the results and address any inquiries.
Sucro Announces Fourth Quarter and Year-End 2025 Results

data.title: ZipRecruiter Finds Grad Job Market Improving Despite Fears That AI Is Eliminating Jobs
data.description: In Santa Monica, California, ZipRecruiter® (NYSE: ZIP) has published its yearly grad report, "Building a New Path: The 2026 Graduate Report." This report, derived from a survey of current and recent college graduates, indicates that the Class of 2026 is encountering heightened competition compared to previous years. There is a larger pool of candidates vying for entry-level positions, yet the number of available jobs in this category has decreased. Notwithstanding these difficult circumstances, outcomes have shown improvement.
